case_title: CRESCENT MANOR PARTNERS, LP VS. BRADFORD VAN WAGENEN ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CRESCENT MANOR PARTNERS, LP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VAN WAGENEN, BRADFORD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 467 TURK STREET #707, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT VAN WAGENEN, BRADFORD
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CRESCENT MANOR PARTNERS, LP SERVED JUN-25-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VAN WAGENEN, BRADFORD
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CRESCENT MANOR PARTNERS, LP AS TO DEFENDANT VAN WAGENEN, BRADFORD DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
